name: Spanish Anise Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a bowl, mix the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles large peas.
4. Stir in the eggs and anise oil until combined thoroughly with your hands.
5. Roll out half of the dough at a time into thin rounds on a lightly floured surface, about 1/4 inch thick.
6. Using a knife or cookie cutter, cut the rolled dough into sticks measuring approximately 4 inches long by 1/2 inch wide.
7. Place the cookies on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 1/2 inch apart.
8. Brush the cookies with softened butter or margarine.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes, until lightly golden.
10. Allow to cool before serving.
This recipe makes approximately 36-48 cookies.
